programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Drama erupts when Patti tries to thaw an Ice Queen's frozen heart. Chef Roble, who must whip up a balance between love and work, checks in. All hell breaks loose when one client tests Patti's patience.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo es víctima del acoso de Daniela, que está buscando a toda costa que la lleve a la cama y, así, quitárselo a Aurora. Catalina revela verdades del pasado de Pasión. Inés le dice a Aurora que elija entre ella o Pasión, juntas no pueden vivir.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Daniela ataca sin límites a Lorenzo. Desea acabar su idilio con Aurora y se quita la máscara de niña buena para mostrar sus deseos de robar un hombre ajeno. Pasión está dispuesta a encontrar a su hijo y convence a Martín de que debe buscar a Vicky.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora cae en la trampa de Daniela para que sienta celos. Después de aclarado el acoso al que ha estado sometido Lorenzo, Aurora lo perdona, pero aun cree que puede perder al amor de su vida. Martín le propone matrimonio a Diana y Vicky se entera.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky sigue reclamando el amor de Martín, mientras él trata de evitarla. César, Blanca y Nina le cuentan a Vicky cosas de su vida anterior. Aurora siente nuevamente el miedo de perder a Lorenzo para siempre, pero está decidida a luchar por su hombre.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: A Martín los planes de casarse se le acaban, ya que Diana no puede ser su esposa por ser divorciada; Vicky ahora puede ser la candidata. Gustavo lo presiona, él tiene 48 horas para casarse. Falla el intento de Lorenzo por convencer de su amor a Aurora.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky y Martín se dejan llevar por el deseo y en medio de su noche de bodas se entregan a toda su pasión. Lorenzo le tiende una trampa a Daniela y le demuestra a Aurora cómo ella lo acosó. Diana va a casa de Vanesa para contarle que su hija se casó.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: A Natalia la alcanzan los pasos en falso de su hija. Una venganza contra Nina termina siendo la razón de una violación. Natalia es llevada de urgencia a la clínica y César y Lorenzo juran vengar el ataque que le hicieron. Vicky recupera la memoria.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y César se alían al diablo para vengar a Natalia. Catalina es quien ofrece su apoyo para acabar con los verdugos de Nina y su madre, pero es muy alto el precio que se podría pagar. Vicky se accidenta por salvar a Nina, que está desesperada.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: La ira de los Lobos los lleva a cometer un secuestro y querer torturar a los culpables del trauma de Natalia. Blanca se da cuenta que Vicky miente sobre su memoria. Elizabeth vuelve a utilizar su veneno contra Natalia, pero Aurora se lo impide.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se arriesga a jugar con fuego en la venganza de los Lobos. Termina entrando en un club nocturno para ayudar a Lorenzo y no perderlo. A César el peligro de muerte lo acecha. Martín se desilusiona con Vicky y le pide un cambio de reglas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: A Lorenzo la muerte lo persigue, y termina por ver morir al hombre que violó a Natalia. Aurora recibe la noticia de un bebé que le cambia la vida. Vicky está muy insegura del amor de Martín. Blanca toma una decisión definitiva sobre su matrimonio.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora y Lorenzo traen a la vida a su hija y nace una esperanza para ellos. Vicky y Martín deciden romper las barreras que los separan para seguir juntos. Christian quiere conocer más a Pasión y comparte sus cosas con ella. César y Blanca se separan.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Un accidente automovilístico cambia la vida de Aurora en su afán de salvar a su niña. Lorenzo y la familia disfrutan el estreno de una obra que cuenta irónicamente su vida. César visita a su madre en el sanatorio y quiere ayudarla a salir adelante.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora muere y deja a Lorenzo con el corazón destrozado. Antes, le encarga que cuide a Aurorita y que su corazón siga dando vida a otra persona. En el cementerio, Lorenzo no puede despedir a su amor porque es detenido por un delito que no es suyo.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Emergency Response Team is deployed when a mentally ill inmate soils his cell and refuses orders; a vicious assault sends another inmate to the hospital; a fresh face joins the female unit, and finds herself in the middle of an investigation.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A celebrity rapper enters the Santa Rita jail but his arrest leaves a heartbroken girlfriend behind; two brothers deal with gangs, drugs and parenthood and a three-time convicted murderer claims he's killed others as well.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A violent gang member asks to move back to general population, following six years in segregation; a brother and sister are charged with murdering a high school football star, two years after he was stabbed to death on an Oakland street corner.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate says a bet for two cups of soup led to a horrific slashing; a case of road rage results in a murder charge for a software engineer; after two years in jail, a jury will decide if he must go to prison for life.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One inmate learns addiction and motherhood do not make a good mix; two other inmates are left wondering which of them is the father of her child; when a feud from the streets boils over in the jail, deputies are forced to respond.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Deputies respond to rising tensions in a female housing unit; a popular rapper, whose ups and downs have been told in the Oakland media, now faces serious charges; a grandmother convicted of a mortgage scam finds her place in the inmate hierarchy.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Welcome to Limon Correctional Facility, a level 4 prison that houses many of Colorado's most dangerous inmates; while visiting Limon Correctional, the Lockup crew is greeted by angry inmates and the cell extraction team is called in to help.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: When Travis Trani took charge in 2008 he oversaw the implementation of several new policies; the restrictions on movement were among the toughest; inmates from the six different housing units could no longer freely move throughout the prison.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is an underground economy, where some deals are signed in ink and others are signed in blood; a rare look at the schemes, hustles and extortions conducted behind prison walls and the consequences they carry.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Extractions provide some of the most dramatic interactions that ever occur between inmates and staff, and few extractions in the state of Colorado have provided more drama than the ones involving Roy Slagle.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hitman Team
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Hitman Team’s Formaggio, Narancia is left wondering why the world is quickly transforming around him. Narancia hunts down his assailant with a hail of bullets as Formaggio tries to understand his attacker’s tracking skills.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A genius croupier wants to leave her syndicate, Ryou assists her.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A yakuza boss tricks Ryou into protecting his daughter, herself a high school gang leader.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: High school girl Phantom Thief #305 asks Ryou to steal the black tulip from a paranormal expert.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A revolutionary girl with a kid in tow contacts Ryou to save her from her local secret services.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang go to save Kikyo. They are struck with Death by Illusion, a demon technique.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Tenseiga and the Tetsusaiga, two great swords that were forged by swordsmith Totosai, have been left to Sesshomaru and Inuyasha by their father.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper begin the last day of their trip together in Newport, South Wales before heading to Newent. Paul is in the lead, but Margie is snapping at his heels. Who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new road trip with Thomas Plant and Anita Manning. The experts are touring the country in a yellow Lotus and their first leg sees them start in Hertfordshire and work their way towards an auction in Banbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On day two of their trip, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning travel around the southwest of England. Thomas learns about one of the UK's great inventing families, and Anita finds out how a mistake on a map resulted in the naming of America.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning are embarking on the third leg of their road trip. Thomas is leading the charge after his success in the last auction, but can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in South Somerset, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning head towards auction in Wimborne, Dorset. Anita learns about a prehistoric man at Cheddar Gorge and Thomas hears about one man's pioneering fight to forecast the weather.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning begin the final day of their road trip in the seaside town of Brighton. Anita has taken the lead with just one auction to go. Does Thomas have what it takes to claw his was back to victory?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old friends become rivals as antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton hit the road in a 1955 Austin Healey. The men start their journey in Glasgow and Phil heads off the mainland before the pair meet up again for auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip, Phil Serrell has some catching up to do. Can he claw back the deficit? Or will James Braxton pull further away as the pair cross the border from Scotland towards an auction in Kendal?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and James Braxton travel through northwest England on the third leg of their trip. Phil visits the birthplace of the world's most iconic band in Liverpool and James relives his childhood as he finds out the story of scouting.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in Kingsley, Cheshire, Phil Serrell and James Braxton head to auction in Liverpool on the penultimate leg of their road trip, Phil with a commanding lead. Can James find a way back into the competition before the trip is over?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton begin the final leg of their road trip in Wales. With James closing the gap, it's all to play for as the experts head for a final auction showdown in Newport, Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Ipswich. Amongst the items viewed are a collection of pre-historic spearheads, an early American flag, a highly valuable silver tankard, and a pair of spectacles worn by Napoleon, as well as a collection of 5,000 Dinky toys.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Dartington Hall near Totnes in Devon, where they examine a set of royal cuff links, a letter from Admiral Nelson, and a valuable collection of silver that surprised parishioners when found in the back of the village church.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Returning to Dartington in Devon finds Michael and the team with another busy day of finds, including a French cabinet with royal connections, a collection of personal letters and artwork produced by Quentin Crisp, and a toy rabbit valued at £10,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In this special edition, Michael Aspel traces what has happened to some of the show's star items. Have owners grown to love items normally banished to the attic after hearing the Roadshow experts' excitement?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Diamond Jubilee
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the Antiques Roadshow team are in a celebratory mood with this special edition marking the Queen's diamond jubilee. Guests arrive at Kensington Palace to record their stories of royal encounters with the Queen in a moving tribute.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Special
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special edition of Antiques Roadshow, as the team heads to Stratford-upon-Avon in search of treasures at Charlecote Park. With Shakespeare's home close by, they search for objects from the days of Elizabethan England.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The nave of Lincoln Cathedral is the setting for the first of the new series when the familiar team of experts uncover rare silver, furniture and ceramics, leavened with a rich variety of toys, dolls and objets d'art brought by local people.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Blackpool's Tower Ballroom comes a rich collection of the curious and the valuable, from a silver spade used to dig the first sod of a new sewage works to a priceless pocket watch and a rare 18th-century plaque.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An original Chippendale side table, a portrait by a famous 20th-century artist, the rarest of ceramic figures, and a very special silver box - they all add up to a particularly good haul when the Roadshow visits Paignton in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A travelling bar and an amusing mechanical rabbit - just two of the more unusual articles to turn up among the antiques at Elgin in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Elsinore Castle in Denmark is the setting for the first foray into Europe. The team is joined by Danish and Swedish experts for an edition full of family treasures: from ceramics, continental furniture, toys, collectables, paintings to works of art.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fine paintings of Hereford cattle turn up appropriately enough, when the experts visit the country town of Leominster in Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Manchester Town Hall the experts inspect locally made furniture, a clock with a disc musical box and an example of the latest in high-priced collectables: the wristwatch.

programme.title: Reindeer Family and Me
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to the wilderness of Lapland where he visits with the indigenous Sami people, reindeer, and sees the Northern Lights.

programme.title: Running With Reindeer
programme.desc: Saba Douglas-Hamilton travels to the Arctic Circle to live with Sami reindeer herders, and participate in the winter reindeer round-up.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Every fall the world's largest land carnivores gather to await the freeze-up of Hudson Bay in Churchill, Manitoba, Canada, the polar bear capital of the world.

programme.title: Polar Bear: Spy on the Ice
programme.desc: First of a two part film offering a rare insight into the life of polar bears.

programme.title: Polar Bear: Spy on the Ice
programme.desc: Second of a two part film offering a rare insight into the life of polar bears.

programme.title: The Great Ice Bear Event
programme.desc: Footage of polar bears encountering humans.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A mother moose and her calf struggle to survive in the Canadian wilderness while facing wolves, swarms of biting flies and Arctic weather.

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When tasked with rescuing an immigrant-owned pool hall in Denver, Jon finds the biggest obstacle is the owner's pride.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of The Kasbah in Aurora, CO, find a less rowdy clientele if he's going to save the once-thriving urban hot spot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A hostile chef and a lascivious owner complicate Jon's efforts to save Dimples, America's oldest karaoke bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Owners Scott and Donna face foreclosure if Jon is unable to rescue Kid Chilleen's Badass BBQ by evicting the bar's equine and biker visitors.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must correct the behavior of a drunk and verbally abusive owner if he's going to save the historic Gipsy, Las Vegas's first gay nightclub.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must restore trust between owners and curb rampant theft among employees to save Barlow's, a failing Georgia sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Sisters Betsy and Stephanie spend most of their time at work tossing back shots, and it's up to Jon to keep these two from running their biker bar into a ditch.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch considers a new career working with Garner as a private eye. Logan cheats on Caroline again. The explosion of an offshore oil rig endangers Stephanie, Cody, and Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As the crippled oil rig sinks and floods with water, Cody, Neely, and Stephanie begin a desperate rescue effort to save the two young couples, and themselves, until the Baywatch lifeguards can arrive to help.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye Morgan asks Hobie to volunteer at a school for young blind children. Things take a dangerous turn when a huge brush fire traps Hobie and the blind children in the hills, and Mitch is the only one who can save them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline tries to stop her sister from making the worst mistake of her life. Cody and Neely rescue two surfers that fall ill due to a highly polluted beach. Mitch enlists the Beach Boys for a benefit concert to raise money to clean up the pollution.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's mother arrives in town for a visit, and after some strange occurrences, he insists she sees a doctor. Meanwhile, Cody loses the motivation to continue his Olympic training and it is up to Stephanie to reinspire him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, CJ, and Caroline go on a girls-only junior lifeguard trip to Catalina which turns dire when two of the girls get trapped in a flooded cave. Meanwhile, a woman who dies in a car accident bequeaths an odd inheritance to Mitch…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie's new friend Isaac is an angry kid who will do anything to get his father's attention. His risky behavior is a problem for the lifeguards. Meanwhile, Caroline meets a jockey who has lost the will to race after an accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan borrows Cody's car without permission and has an accident, then lies to the police. Meanwhile, the Baywatch team settles an internal dispute with a paintball war and C.J. takes in an injured sea lion, causing problems with her roommates.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates takes hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan and Caroline’s relationship hits a new low when Caroline returns his engagement ring, but things change when a baby is left in Logan’s possession. Meanwhile, Cody must overcome yet another setback to his Olympic career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline blames herself for a teen's death in a fiery nighttime boating accident and goes through Critical Incident Stress. Pushing everyone away, Caroline begins partying to distract from her guilt. Can the team help her recover from her PTSD?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, unseen creature begins attacking beachgoers, and it is up to the Baywatch team to find the creature. Meanwhile, Inside Sports Magazine wants a lifeguard for their swimsuit issue. Neely and Caroline compete for the cover.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan must help his friend Carmen raise $50,000 to keep her ranch, and Jessie Lee Harris is back in town just in time to help. Mitch finds himself in a deadly race for justice during his vacation in Baja, Mexico.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, Caroline, and CJ become Charlie’s Angels in a fun fantasy romp through 70's television as they try and catch an escaped psychopath bent on killing lifeguards.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: 6-time MMA World Champion Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousasi puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against the division’s top-ranked contender, tenacious submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls, South Dakota where heavyweight MMA icons collide as French knockout artist Cheick Kongo takes on Russian destroyer Sergei Kharitonov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in San Jose as Former Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis welcomes Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero to the Bellator cage as the Cuban sensation makes his highly anticipated promo-tional debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: A highly anticipated rematch between former World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima and human highlight reel Michael 'Venom' Page takes center stage in London, and fast-rising Irish star Leah 'The Curse' McCourt battles Jessica 'Black Widow' Borga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Lithuanian sensation Julius Anglickas in the main event, while Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on Corey 'Overtime' Anderson in the co-main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Last Emperor' comes home for Bellator MMA’s first event in Russia as MMA Heavy-weight G.O.A.T Fedor Emelianenko enters the cage for one of the final fights of his historic career to take on one of the division’s top contenders, #2 ranked Tim Johnson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Lightweight World Championship is on the line as Dub-lin’s own Peter 'The Showstopper' Queally collides with Patricky Pitbull. And Irish phenom James 'The Strabanimal' Gallagher battles it out with Patchy 'No Love' Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: One of the greatest mixed martial artists of all-time returns when Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Championship on the line against Irish knockout artist Sinead 'KO' Kavanagh.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robert, a retired professor, says he began dating as his 40-year marriage unraveled. Wife Jeremi says Robert spent their $1 million savings on day trading and giving money to women, who she insists are catfish. Dr. Phil finds out what is going on. Part 1

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando las esposas de dos marines son asesinadas, Gibbs y el equipo son llamados para investigar. Gibbs y el equipo temen que los asesinatos tengan una motivación racial, ya que las dos mujeres son asiáticas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS queda conmocionado cuando descubre la cabeza cortada de un marine en un desguace ilegal de automóviles regentado por marines.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la misteriosa explosión de una ambulancia que supuestamente transporta los restos de un marine fallecido en un accidente de tráfico.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC regresa a sus orígenes cuando miran uno de los viejos casos de Rossi y Gideon para localizar a un asesino que se escapó.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una cafetería explota en Indianápolis y un héroe emerge de los escombros, la UAC trata de proteger a esa persona y a su familia mientras buscan al sospechoso antes de que ocurran más incidentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Las víctimas en California hacen que la UAC busque a un sospechoso que puede haber sido testigo de abuso cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la misteriosa explosión de una ambulancia que supuestamente transporta los restos de un marine fallecido en un accidente de tráfico.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo son llamados a investigar cuando un grupo de adolescentes de excursión descubren unas placas de identificación de la Marina en un bosque nacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un estudiante adolescente de un instituto de la base de Quantico se adhiere una bomba al cuerpo y retiene a sus compañeros como rehenes.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Todd Gauthier put his love of truck driving to the side for his son, Brian. Trucking money was not enough to put Brian through college, so Todd sacrificed his love of the road for a better paying job.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Richardson is an American hero. He served our country during the Vietnam War and was awarded two purple hearts. After the war, Mike got into trucking.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: A few years ago, Darrell gave it up, became an ordained minister and founded the Best Wedding Chapel. The crown jewel of his chapel is his 1942 American La France Fire Engine.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: During his cancer treatments, Chris had to sell his Kenworth to pay the never-ending medical bills. By an amazing stroke of luck, he tracked down his old Kenworth and was able to buy it back.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2014. Anthony Bourdain soaks up all Amritsar has to offer. Go with him as he samples savory delicacies at roadside restaurants and experiences a Gurpurab festival.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2014. Anthony Bourdain travels to Las Vegas with food author Michael Ruhlman, where they explore sites including Huntridge Tavern.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2017. A rise in politically-charged songs follows the killings of four Kent State University students during anti-Vietnam War protests.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 05/11/2017. In the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina, local musicians are joined by international stars for benefit concerts to preserve New Orleans' rich cultural heritage.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2017. Exploring the music that kept the spirit of the civil rights movement alive following Martin Luther King Jr.’s death.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2017. Exploring the music that kept the spirit of the civil rights movement alive following Martin Luther King Jr.’s death.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/27/2017. In the wake of the 9/11 attacks, songs about New York have heightened meaning, while politically-charged country music takes center stage.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2017. A rise in politically-charged songs follows the killings of four Kent State University students during anti-Vietnam War protests.

programme.title: Soundtracks

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 05/18/2017. Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin’s walk on the moon helps inspire musicians to imagine a cosmic future for mankind.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 05/25/2017. Examine the role music has played since the emergence of the LGBTQ movement, following the Stonewall riots.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 06/01/2017. Tennis great Billie Jean King’s win over Bobby Riggs was a milestone in the push for gender equity, sparking music that included messages of female empowerment.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 06/08/2017. See the course of the Cold War through the lens of Berlin, as well as the music that helped sow the seeds of change.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. Dr. Sanjay Gupta travels to Japan to see how inhabitants of Tokyo deal with work-induced stress and to learn why people in Okinawa live such long lives.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. While in India, Dr. Sanjay Gupta explores the connection between the reemergence of traditional Indian health techniques, Ayurveda and Yoga.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2019. To explore the benefits of living at high altitude for heart health, Dr. Sanjay Gupta heads into the Andes of Bolivia.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 05/04/2019. Dr. Sanjay Gupta explores the dark, desolate and chilly regions of Northern Norway to find out how Norwegians have unlocked the secret to happiness.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 05/11/2019. In a country otherwise known for its vices, Dr. Gupta finds a powerful tradition of food, family and faith contributes to Italy’s health.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unruly man gives deputies a hard time, witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver plows through multiple barricades, and a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An injured suspect spots his window of opportunity, a man tries to order officers around who caught him with unsavory items, and detectives catch someone in a sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood search ends with the suspect in a stranger's home, a pastor calls about a suspicious car parked behind his church, and a deputy gives advice to a young mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to possible execution by the electric chair - and to a legendary Vegas murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb, prompting Sara to interrogate the students and faculty of the college where her mother-in-law works.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box; meanwhile, Langston's wife pays a surprise visit to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer, Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Following his escape, Nate Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston becomes more determined than ever to track down Nake Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, after discovering that he's kidnapped his ex-wife, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After years of pursuit and a countless number of murders, Langston comes face-to-face with serial killer Nate Haskell inside the house where his killing spree began.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Multiple shootings and stabbings on a public tram leave the CSI team with one witness and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Three suspects come forward with three different reasons why they killed an entire family and the CSI team has to determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While on a date, Stokes realizes a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs are led into the sexy world of male gigolos when they uncover an unusual murder weapon.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tornado touches down on a murder scene, damaging the evidence and putting Ryan and Walter in grave danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team chases a sadistic killer who takes women’s eyes, and a new nemesis challenges Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protects a Mexican police chief from the mysterious assassin who killed her husband.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In a deserted mansion, the CSIs find a body hanging that appears to have been killed by a vampire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an entire family disappears into thin air, Horatio vows to find them, dead or alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs expose the seedy underbelly of children’s beauty pageants when a contestant's mom is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a neighborhood do-gooder is murdered, Horatio and the CSIs discover that he was planning to blow the whistle on something big.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia de una investigación de asesinato lleva al equipo de CSI a creer que el asesino puede estar en Nueva York, Horatio lleva su investigación a la Gran Manzana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una peligrosa investigación lleva al equipo de CSI por un camino traicionero que conducirá a la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El ambiente de discoteca de Miami se vuelve mortal cuando el consumo de alcohol por parte de menores provoca un sangriento asesinato en un baño, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach es evacuada debido a un tsunami, pero el equipo de CSI permanece después de descubrir un complot de robo a un banco mientras investiga un asesinato aparentemente aleatorio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una serie de cadáveres, encontrados frente a la costa de Miami, resulta ser obra de piratas modernos. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un hombre inocente muere cuando alguien cae sobre él desde un balcón. El equipo de CSI se encuentra en el centro de un escándalo de sexo y un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de auto aparentemente al azar resulta ser lo contrario cuando la adicción al juego de una mujer joven se vuelve más de lo que la empresa familiar puede soportar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación de un tiroteo en la sala de emergencias de un hospital coloca al equipo de CSI en medio de un caso de asesinato que involucra al líder de una pandilla callejera importante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man falls 52 stories to his death, and his body goes missing after it hits the ground, the CSIs must treat this as a missing persons case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The most exclusive jewelry auction of the year ends abruptly when an appraiser is killed during the event. The investigation takes an emotional turn.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac informs an ex-con that he served time for a crime he didn't commit, and Anna tells Danny it's time for the first CSI baby to be born.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella discovers that New Yorkers are being murdered over ancient Greek artifacts, she hands over her badge to follow a clue that leads to Greece.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When transferring Robert Dunbrook's son from prison to court, the NYPD is ambushed by a group of professional kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: One CSI New York team member's life is changed forever in a significant way following the aftermath of a shooting incident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is tracking a cyber-killer who is currently threatening the lives of several medical healthcare workers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: This week the CSI New York team is hunting for a serial killer who is equipped with an incredibly deadly sense of direction.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators is called in to investigate the very recent murder of an underground hip-hop dancer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a software executive, the CSIs are exposed to the underground world of food splooshing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Las Vegas CSI Ray Langston comes to New York to help Mac and the CSI team try and save a hostage from a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In the culmination of a multi-episode mystery, the CSI New York team of investigators uncovers the dark lair of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Quién está ahí? (S8 E11)
programme.desc: Una investigación de violación de domicilio se vuelve más complicada cuando la familia de la víctima resulta ser menos perfecta de lo que parecía originalmente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Brooklyn hasta la muerte (S8 E12)
programme.desc: Un juego de rol se vuelve letal cuando un jugador es víctima de un asesino auténtico y el otro es secuestrado para pedir un rescate.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El efecto dominó (S8 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga dos muertes aparentemente sin relación, sus rastros separados de evidencias conducen a una conclusión que sorprendentemente las vincula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fin del juego (S8 Ep14)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se encuentra inmerso en el mundo de los videojuegos competitivos cuando descubre que un asesinato puede estar relacionado con un torneo de altas apuestas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Caso cerrado (S8 Ep15)
programme.desc: Asesinan a un técnico de laboratorio en un caso que se parece a otro sin resolver de la década de 1950, el equipo de CSI vislumbra lo que sucede en las sombras del laboratorio.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI a un proyecto de viviendas en Brooklyn para investigar el asesinato de un exitoso empresario que se sintió atraído por su antiguo vecindario.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando un jefe de bomberos, amigo de Mac, muere en un incendio provocado con la técnica que usó un pirómano recientemente liberado bajo palabra.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)
programme.desc: La evidencia encontrada en fotos en la escena de un crimen en el puente de Brooklyn envía a Mac y a Jo a San Francisco en busca de una adolescente desaparecida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Alexandra y José tuvieron una hija de adolescentes y la dieron en adopción. Ahora José quiere casarse con ella. Además, Miguel pide la custodia de su hijastra porque el papá es un delincuente.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Sandra exige indemnización por daños causados a su hija Isabela por un compañero de escuela. La madre de Alondra tiene alzhéimer, su padre la envió a una clí­nica y trajo a casa a su amante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lola obliga a su esposo Rocco a inyectarse esteroides para tener mejor desempeño físico y sexual. Además, Ángela descubrió que una alumna está siendo abusada por un familiar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Violeta conoce al hijo de Adriana por una aplicación móvil, pero él es menor de edad. Además, el esposo de Sara era amante de Naomi, su marido los sorprende y mata al señor.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yanni reclama su herencia para unirse a las Monjas del Monte, una congregación dedicada a cultivar cannabis. Rebeca sabe que su hermana es maltratada por su esposo, pero no lo quiere reconocer.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luisa se contagió de Hepatitis C porque le echó leche materna de Diana a su café. Por otro lado, Rebeca tuvo un accidente porque se distrajo al ver una valla con su cuerpo desnudo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Los padres de Scarlett se han casado y divorciado durante cincuenta años. Además, Irene fue despedida porque se burló de los mexicanos y la fe que tienen en la Virgen de Guadalupe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Mariana cuida a la hija de Brenda y al cambiarla descubre que la niña tiene muchos moretones en el cuerpo. Marisol paga condenas ajenas a cambio de dinero, así construyó un capital importante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Norma casó a su hijo con una cubana para obtener los papeles, pero ellos se gustan. En otro caso, Ángel fue novio de Alonso en la cárcel y aunque pensaban casarse, habí­a una mujer entre ellos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Néstor se casó con la exesposa de su amigo Junior y se hizo cargo de su hija, pero ahora la mujer murió. Además, Andrés es un blogger que fomenta un juego en Internet muy peligroso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rafael perdió una pierna defendiendo a su suegra Sonia, ella le compró una prótesis y ahora se la quita. Juan es torero y le enseña a sus hijos esta peligrosa profesión, su esposa se opone.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Omary y Stefany trabajan como sexoservidoras en Colombia, sus colegas no las quieren por lo que cobran. La madre de Joel lo dejó solo con su violento padre, el señor murió y ella ha regresado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Una joven fue secuestrada y su familia pagó con lo que tenían para lograr su liberación. Harold, Fernando y Omar trabajaban en la misma barbería, pero una broma pesada los arruinó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lili es despedida de su trabajo como mesera porque ha tenido una erección en horario laboral. Además, un pastor rompe el acuerdo de mantener al hijo de Mónica porque ella fue infiel.
