programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Not knowing the contents of Pat's secret box drives SpongeBob crazy; Squidward lies to an old rival about having a band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While working the graveyard shift, Squidward tells SpongeBob a scary story about the Hash Slinging Slasher; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob attempts to write an 800-word essay before morning; Patrick tries to impress his parents on Starfish Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob uses a "bad" word; SpongeBob enrolls in an art class that Squidward is teaching.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Santa doesn't show up on Christmas morning, everyone in Bikini Bottom blames SpongeBob for getting their hopes up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets SpongeBob fired; Sandy and SpongeBob encounter a ferocious worm.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton invents a machine enabling him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs; SpongeBob volunteers for lifeguard duty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward squeeze inside a tiny treehouse; SpongeBob adopts a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that Squidward has never actually tried a krabby patty; a bully threatens SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and SpongeBob hide the health inspector's body; SpongeBob and Patrick throw out their new TV and keep the box.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick throw snowballs at Squidward; Mr. Krabs has a garage sale.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Stardom goes to SpongeBob's head after he appears in Krabs' low-budget commercial; Squidward becomes impoverished.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to convince a bouncer that he is tough enough for the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's archenemy returns.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob thinks Mr. Krabs is a robot; SpongeBob and Patrick care for an abandoned baby clam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick paint Mr. Krab's living room; Krusty Krab training video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob micromanages an all-out shindig for the denizens of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Pat sell candy bars door to door, they end up buying more than they sell; superheroes visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick joins SpongeBob at boating school, but it's not smooth sailing; Mr. Krabs celebrates a business milestone.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: In prehistoric Bikini Bottom, SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob inadvertently helps Plankton get all the citizens of Bikini Bottom on Santa's naughty list.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando Luan escucha por casualidad a sus hermanos quejándose de su comedia, ella decide abandonarla; los niños deciden no contarle a Leni sobre la próxima fiesta de su madre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y su papá van a "Leyendas del Templo Oculto" y no pueden esperar ni un minuto para pasar un día juntos entre padre e hijo; Lincoln quiere ir al centro comercial, pero tiene que cuidar a sus hermanas menores, por lo que decide llevarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia participa en un concurso de lectura en la biblioteca, pero Lola no quiere unirse. Lincoln sospecha que sus padres le ocultan algo sobre sus orígenes cuando descubre que su álbum de bebé tiene la primera página totalmente en blanco.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños le dan un viejo muñeco que canta a Lily para detener su llanto, pero rápidamente los vuelve locos; los chicos intentan convencer a Papá de la nueva tecnología cuando le declara la guerra a los dispositivos electrónicos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere el sofá para ver su programa favorito, pero sus hermanas no le dejan; Lincoln le deja un mensaje a Lori en su correo de voz, pero se arrepiente enseguida y busca la manera de eliminarlo antes de que Lori lo escuche.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln está cansado de que sus hermanas se entrometan en su vida, pero su opinión cambia cuando se burlan de él en la escuela; Lincoln graba los momentos más embarazosos de sus hermanas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va a trabajar para Plankton; Bob Esponja crea un GarabatoEsponja, quien le juega bromas a todo el mundo, obligando a Bob Esponja a borrarlo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja no soporta que Patricio no le diga qué hay dentro de la caja; Calamardo, Bob Esponja y la pandilla forman su propia banda de música.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Mientras trabaja en el turno de la noche, Calamardo le cuenta a Bob Esponja una historia de miedo acerca de un asesino.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lee una palabra soez y no sabe lo que significa, pero la repite. Bob Esponja se inscribe en una clase de arte que imparte Calamardo, pero él es un profesor arrogante y quiere seguir las explicaciones del libro al pie de la letra.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Pat consigue un trabajo en el Chum Bucket y compite con Bob Esponja en los juegos Fry Cook; Bob Esponja lleva una manada de medusas al Sr. Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Como Don Cangrejo es injusto con sus empleados, Bob Esponja y Calamardo deciden hacer una huelga. Una lombriz aterroriza Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo no está permitido en la casa del árbol de Bob Esponja y Patricio; luego, Bob Esponja adopta un caballito de mar, y se lo lleva por todas partes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja descubre que Calamardo nunca ha probado una Krabby Patty; y luego, Bob Esponja es preocupado por un nuevo alumno en la escuela de canotaje.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo y Bob Esponja ocultan el cuerpo de un inspector de sanidad; Bob Esponja y Patricio tiran su nueva TV y conservan la caja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio le muestran a Calamardo una ó dos cosas acerca de la nieve en `The Snowball Effect', y en `One Krab's Trash', el Sr Krabs accidentalmente vende un sombrero valioso a Bob Esponja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El estrellato se sube a la cabeza de Bob Esponja después de que él aparece en el comercial de bajo presupuesto del Crustáceo Cascarudo; Calamardo se empobrece.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta convencer a un portero de que él es suficientemente fuerte para entrar a la Escupidera de Salty. El archienemigo de Calamardo regresa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene pesadillas tras haber visto una película de terror: cree que los robots han tomado el control del mundo. Bob Esponja y Patricio han encontrado una pequeña almeja y deciden adoptarla y protegerla hasta que sea mayor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo sabiamente elige a Bob Esponja y a Patricio para decorar su sala de estar; luego, aprenden acerca de ser un excelente empleado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja pasa una noche en la cárcel después de ser detenido por la policía tratando de entrar a su casa, después de que accidentalmente se queda por fuera durante una fiesta.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja y Patricio venden barras de chocolate de puerta en puerta, terminan comprando más de lo que venden. Superhéroes los visitan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja olvida quien es él cuando pierde su etiqueta de identidad; Plankton celebra los 25 años tratando de robar la receta secreta del restaurant Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Es "Fondo de Bikini" prehistórico y pasamos un día en la vida de SpongeGar, Patar y Squog; nuestros tres amigos neandertales descubren el fuego, sólo para apagarlo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El Sr. Cangrejo debe aprender a ser más generoso si quiere evitar que el Holandés Errante lo lance en el casillero de Davy Jones; Bob Esponja decide quedarse en casa para siempre.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Spain, Tony cooks at the best restaurant in the world, El Bulli.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the musical culture of the Californian High Desert.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: The soul of Cuba is found in a baseball stadium packed with exuberant fans.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony and Zamir team up for a trip to the former Soviet Republic of Ukraine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony returns to Cambodia to reconnect with this historically rich country.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony immerses himself in unexplored gastronomical treasures of the Amazon.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the Ozark culture and its unique and hospitable community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels into the Kurdish region of Iraq and Turkey.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Naples on a quest to define true Italian food and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony, who has never been to Vienna, digs deeper into its real culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores Japan through the culinary phenomenon that is "Cook it Raw.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Despite its sad history, Anthony finds Mozambique is full of optimism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels around Emilia Romagna in a Ferrari with Chef Michael White.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony experiences the cultural & culinary rebirth of Portugal's capital.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Finland, Tony joins musician Sami Yaffa on the world's only pub tram.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony makes a long overdue trip to the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony takes an epic journey that ends with meat pies and gunshot wounds.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tara tells her sister that she's sleeping with her boyfriend and he's been paying her! Next Christina says she loves Mitchell, but he hasn't been treating her right. Then Carla's husband wanted her out of his life so he set her up with his cousin!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beba is here to confront her cousin for stealing her man. Next Tiffany thinks she is going to marry Brian today but there's a catch. Then Billie may have introduced her longtime love, Arkim, to Tiffanie, but today she wants him for herself.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel made a decision that he regrets because he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Misty hates her best friend's newlywed man so much that she's willing to pay for the divorce. Lucus is ready to divorce his wife of 6 weeks if her family doesn't stop meddling!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Stephanie's very suspicious that fiance Ryan has been cheating because he comes home reeking of body spray. Then Whisky business! After getting rejected in a proposal to his girlfriend, Bob polished off a bottle of whisky with her mother.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lisa has had all six of her children REMOVED from her home as a result of neglect and abuse which she still tries to justify.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: First, Daniel has almost a dozen children with ten different women. While he admits to being their father, he refuses to care and provide for most of them. Then, Tadrianna strips and has sex for money and her mother, Kim, can't convince her to stop.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: In today's episode, guests face the ultimate test of truth with a lie detector. Redemption awaits for some, while shocking lies will be exposed for others. The power of the truth will be revealed, transforming their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se sorprende muchísimo cuando Fidela le dice que dios hará el milagro de salvar a su hija. Patricio se niega a cenar y cuando Camelia le pregunta dice que no sabe nada de Sonia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica todos están consternados por el accidente de Caridad. Al rato llega Luis Mario y Bruno, quienes cuentan que Caridad tenía algo muy importante que decirle.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella y Eduarda celebran la noticia que Silvano y Rosaura se van a casar, ya que de esta manera Rosaura se irá de la vida de Luis Mario. Mientras tanto Doña Cruz trata de reprender a los niños.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura entra a la habitación de la clínica donde está Angeliquita y le pregunta a la enfermera que dijeron los médicos y ella le responde que la niña se está recuperando satisfactoriamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana encuentra a Eduarda y le pregunta porque esta ahí con Caridad. Eduarda disimulando su plan le dice que está visitándola por la salud de Caridad y que ella la quiere como una nana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad le va a contar todo a Luis Mario pero en ese momento llega la enfermera y le dice a Luis Mario que Caridad se encuentra muy mal y que por el momento no puede hablar porque se agita mucho.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, acompañado de Camelia, se encuentra con Luis Mario y Marybella en la borda de un barco. Allí Patricio aprovecha la oportunidad de descargar su ira tocando el punto débil de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena despide a Guillermo en el hospital donde esta Caridad hospitalizada y en ese momento llega Iván y los ve besándose, mientras Silvano le dice a Luisana que Rosaura termino con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está ilusionada con reunir junto a su hija y Luis Mario para ser felices. Piensa mucho en ellos. De momento desea comunicarse con Luis Mario para proponerle reconciliación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano le pide a Guillermo que por favor se apure en conseguir una modelo para un comercial de vino y en esos momentos llega Rosaura y Guillermo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le reclama a Marybella el hecho de haberlo tenido engañado durante tanto tiempo, porque ya se enteró que ella puede ver. Marybella llorando le pide por Dios, que por favor la perdone.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious force that resembles Cavendish menaces the battlefield - but while it appears to help Bartolomeo and the others at first, it sets its sights on Robin! Meanwhile, the deeply-wounded Ideo sees Dellinger's horrible true nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo is in a neck-and-neck battle against Gladius to save Robin, and is faced with an impossible dilemma. With all his options leading to their defeat, can his cunning ploy save the day? Meanwhile, Robin is face to face with Cavendish.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Princess Mansherry's amazing power - to heal living beings completely - is in the hands of the Donquixote executive. If she is able to heal all the executives who've gone down in battle - the Straw Hats and their allies stand no chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Señor Pink and Franky continue their knock-down, drag-out, manly fight. As both of them are pushed to their limits, we learn Señor's tragic past! Meanwhile, Princess Mansherry's rescue hits a snag as she stubbornly refuses to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Señor Pink end their harrowing duel in a manly way - but victory knocks the wind out of even the winner's sails! Meanwhile, Diamante and Kyros struggle desperately on the Sunflower Field, each demonstrating their extreme prowess.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros, unbowed by Diamante's vicious attacks, fights back with the anger and retribution of all of Dressrosa in order to fulfill his promise to protect Rebecca. If he is successful, only a few executives will remain.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond catapults into his most passionate adventure -- not for country, not for justice, but for personal revenge. Timothy Dalton brings urgency, charm and deadly determination to his role as 007.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Vive y deja morir
programme.desc: James Bond lucha contra las fuerzas de la magia negra en esta aventura de alto impacto que lo lanza desde las calles de Nueva York hasta los pantanosos paisajes de Louisiana.

programme.title: El hombre del revólver de oro
programme.desc: James Bond ha sido marcado por la muerte y necesitará sus instintos letales y su seductor encanto para sobrevivir en esta gran aventura llena de acción.

programme.title: La espía que me amó
programme.desc: Nadie lo hace mejor que Bond, y lo comprueba una vez más en esta explosiva y entretenida aventura que lo lleva de las pirámides egipcias hasta el fondo del océano y a una desafiante persecución de esquí en la cima de una montaña.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: The heat is on in this fast-paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friend's killer in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Assault on VA-33
programme.desc: Sean Patrick Flanery (The Boondock Saints) stars as Army Veteran Jason Hill. While on a VA hospital visit, terrorists infiltrate the building and take hostages. Hill is now outnumbered and the last line of defense against the armed insurgents.

programme.title: Domino
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Domino follows a young woman who decides to become a bounty hunter. A fun venture turns deadly when a masked gang robs an armored car for ten million dollars, starting a chain reaction of nonstop action.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Three dingo families have established their homes in different habitats in Australia. They are apex predators as well as highly sociable animals with a deep sense of loyalty.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: When humans and wild animals live next door to one another, things can sometimes be a little hairy. Some organize themselves in impertinent gangs, others mutually cultivate their own friendships.

programme.title: Blue Water Savages
programme.desc: Bull sharks are the junkyard dogs of the shark world. They are territorial, nasty tempered, and have the strongest bite force per pound of any other shark.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina is back with Sean and hosted at the Hide Safari Camp in Hwange National Park at their driest period. A night drive leads them to a unique finding. They discover an unexpected leopard kill and spend time with a hungry pride as they study the menu.

programme.title: Unknown Belize
programme.desc: Sean and Gelareh follow the Macal and the Belize Rivers. Gelareh joins local rangers protecting the scarlet macaw parrot, before they explore the country’s largest pine forest.

programme.title: American Mustang
programme.desc: A young girl discovers that America's wild horses are in danger of being wiped off the land they've called home for thousands of years, as American Mustang the Movie unveils the compelling story of the wild mustang.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Southern Red Sea

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Sao Vicente & Santo Antao

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Following the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of Little Penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking and vigorous night life.

programme.title: Frick I Love Nature
programme.desc: The arctic is one of the harshest environments on earth, so how does life survive there? To learn about arctic animals, Gordie sniffs some polar bear fur, goes dog sledding and discovers that lemmings are a lie.

programme.title: Blue Water Savages
programme.desc: Ranked second only to great whites in aggression, tiger sharks display a wide range of behavior. If you're playing in the surf or diving in deep water when you meet one, the experience can be quite surprising.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark and Trent take you into the depths of the water in Bonaire to see one of the FBI's most wanted shipwrecks!

programme.title: Adapt To Survive
programme.desc: In a world governed by the ebb and flow of the seasons, animals need a strategy to survive. Where some wait out the harder times, others need to hit the road in search of greener pastures.

programme.title: In the Realm of the Giants - Mysterious Cephalopods
programme.desc: Octopuses and squids are anything but cuddly pets. They have neither legs nor fins.

programme.title: Shark Man With Riley Elliott: Great White
programme.desc: Right at the southern end of New Zealand we find Stewart Island, home to the Great White Shark. Locals are convinced that the shark cage operators are attracting the sharks in, putting them at risk when fishing and diving.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: There are two types of client at this restaurant called Earth: the gluttons and the ascetics.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: Eating is a major part of the lives of all animals. Their diets may vary greatly - meat, fruit, grass, fish - but they all have one thing in common.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: Massive predators are caught on camera fighting over food.

programme.title: Coral Reef Adventure
programme.desc: Coral Reef Adventure follows the real-life expedition of ocean explorers and underwater filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall. The Halls guide us to the islands and sun-drenched waters of the South Pacific to document the health and beauty of coral reefs.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: Three survivors from the ill-fated UA Flight 232 relive the terrifying moments leading up to and after one of America's worst ever aviation disasters.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: The stunning seaside city of San Jose Del Cabo is featured in this amazing adventure.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: No other lodge in Alaska does it quite like Dove Island Lodge. Owners Duane and Tracy Lambert bring their Napa Valley roots and eloquent dining experience to the rugged yet scenic splendor of Southeast Alaska.

programme.desc: We once again join the amazing crew of the 93 custom catamaran sport fisher, the Ultimate Lady, but this time in the gorgeous Austral Islands of Tahiti.

programme.title: Anglers Digest: Tahiti 2

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors takes a look at two of the newest items available for hunters -- the Thompson/Center Compass Generation II and TenPoint Crossbows' new Vengent Crossbow.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors takes a look at the growing interest in handgun hunting as we go on hunts for Impala, Hogs, Axis, Fallow, and Whitetail with a handgun.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors hits the woods with shotguns and crossbows while hunting spring time gobblers.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The Fishing Impossible team head to Mozambique to take on the world's ultimate spear fishing challenge. Their mission is to spear a powerful dogtooth tuna at St Lazarus Banks.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by a crocodile while swimming in an African river.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man comes face-to-face with a hungry mountain lion in Colorado.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy remove a gator from under an Elvis impersonator's car.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys get a nuisance gator call from a renaissance fair.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In an 8th floor apartment in Miami Beach, one man raises a spotted hyena, putting himself in mortal danger. In Africa, a schoolteacher wakes to the sound of her own bones crunching as she is dragged away in the vice-like grip of a hyena's jaws.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Sam Mazzola kept bears on his farm in Iowa. He charged people to wrestle them and enjoyed the attention and financial rewards. When a young employee is killed while tending to a savage bear, the dark truth about Sam's destructive lifestyle is revealed.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In 2011, 49 dangerous animals including tigers, lions, and bears roamed free in Ohio. The ensuing bloodbath hit headlines across the world. But what drove the man responsible release his exotic pets and how did his addiction to them spiral out of control?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: A Turbulent Future
programme.desc: Over time, the Atlantic Ocean widened. Then Africa moved north, struck Europe and birthed the Alps. Erosion, volcanic activity, and ice ages fashioned an extraordinarily rich and varied continent, ready for the arrival of human beings.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: DESTROYER follows the moral and existential odyssey of LAPD detective Erin Bell who, as a young cop, was placed undercover with a gang in the California desert with tragic results.

programme.title: The Paperboy

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La sala de emergencias se convierte en un lugar peligroso cuando se encuentran drogas de contrabando en el vientre de un paciente; un médico está desconcertado por múltiples ataques cardíacos en una familia.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña entra a la sala de emergencias y no puede moverse de la cintura para abajo. Sus padres están enojados cuando los médicos la enviaron a su casa una semana antes.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y su equipo investigan una red de juego ilegal que ha puesto en marcha un torneo de ruleta rusa. Pronto encuentran una página en Internet por donde se está emitiendo la mortal competición.

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Números

programme.title: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s (2007)
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, a fresh style of standup comedy emerged tackling previously taboo subjects as sex, religion, politics, and drugs. Here are those comedians who took the big risks years ago and paved the way for today's crop of maverick comics.

programme.title: Call Me Lucky
programme.desc: Barry Crimmins was a volatile but brilliant comic who became an honored peace activist and influential political satirist. Famous comedians and others build a picture of a man who underwent an incredible transformation.

programme.title: Looking for Lenny

programme.title: Norm Macdonald: Me Doing Stand-Up

programme.title: Paul Mooney: Analyzing White America
programme.desc: Paul Mooney is angry, fearless and very funny. Here he takes direct aim at racism and White America and hits his targets with dead-on accuracy and humor.

programme.title: Phyllis Diller: Not Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: Phyllis Diller's brand of comedy is as timeless today as it was in the 1960s when she became a regular on popular variety and talk shows. Phyllis Diller was a pioneer among female comediennes highlights some of her best routines.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, Detective John Sheppard is with the Las Vegas Police Department and begins to investigate a strange series of murders believed to be the work of a bizarre serial killer. Has life changed or is this a dangerous Wraith plot?

programme.desc: Leah gets the verdict of her custody case, a fight threatens Kailyn and Jo's renewed friendship, Jenelle introduces her new boyfriend to Barb, and Chelsea is outraged by Adam's online posts.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi get some bad news about his job, Barb expresses concern about Jenelle's new boyfriend, and Chelsea and Cole take a major step together.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Cole has a big surprise for Chelsea, Kailyn and Javi decide to spend time apart after a fight, and Jenelle is forced to face her assault charges against Nathan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah flirts with the idea of getting back together with Jeremy, Isaac struggles with Javi's impending deployment, and Jenelle's birthday trip to New York turns sour after a text from Nathan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: In this spectacular episode, Javi says a tearful goodbye to his family before deployment. Jenelle meets with Nathan, fueling David's jealousy. Corey and Leah face off at Ali's doctor's appointment. Chelsea and Cole debate changing Aubree's last name.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Corey go to court over custody of the twins, Jenelle agrees to let Nathan see Kaiser after David volunteers to be a mediator, and Kailyn tries to help Isaac with Javi's deployment.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole meet Jason Aldean before seeing him in concert, Kailyn and Javi struggle with being apart during his deployment, and Leah gets troubling news about her custody agreement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn tries to repair her relationship with Jo's girlfriend Vee, Cole escorts Aubree to her father-daughter dance, and Leah and Corey are forced to reassess their custody agreement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Miranda make amends, Aubree asks Adam why he didn't show up to her father-daughter dance, and Kailyn rebuilds her relationship with Jo while distancing herself from Javi.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi's long-distance marriage is on the rocks, Chelsea celebrates milestones with Aubree, and Leah's relationship with Jeremy hits a bump despite her strides with Corey.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan obliga a Paula a confesar sus sentimientos sin saber que ella esconde el secreto que enfrenta a Gaspar y José. Miguel y Sofía se encuentran en el granero de los del Monte, Modesto oye un ruido y, al no ver a nadie, los deja encerrados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela interroga con insistencia a Fernando sobre el novio de Sara, Rosario le ruega a Franco que vuelva con ella, él le dice a quién ama; Armando da una orden, muy molesto con su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la hacienda Elizondo, Rosario le jura a Sara que luchará por Franco, Norma interroga a su hermana, quien delante de Jimena, dice que lo ama. Ruth escucha que es adoptada, Raquel le miente.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se percata de los dos hombres que acechan a Franco y responde con rapidez, Ruth, sin saber a dónde ir, huye de casa de Raquel. Dínora busca a Gabriela con otro ardid contra Juan y Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se desvela de la angustia y Eva la consuela, Hortencia se desmaya al ver al fantasma de Libia y pide perdón. Fernando desafía a Sara, al tiempo que Memo cumple la orden de su jefe Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia tiembla porque Libia regresó para vengarse, Manolo confiesa lo sucedido la noche en la que la joven se suicidó tras visitar a los Elizondo. Memo le dice a Armando que mató a Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le cuenta a Norma por qué Ruth los buscó, Jimena está furiosa, piensa que a ella le gusta Óscar. Melisa visita a Raquel acompañada de sus hijos, a la vez que Gabriela aconseja a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Memo le daña los frenos al carro de Armando para acabar con él, pero quien se accidenta es otro. A Gabriela le molestan las visitas de Dínora, pero al menos descubre dónde está Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Ruth, le ruega que regrese a casa y ella se niega, Juan le pide que respete esa decisión. Memo planea otro accidente para matar a Armando, esta vez espera no fallar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gives a parking ticket to the Governor's car, and refuses to tear it up.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A car containing a high-powered businessman breaks down in low-powered Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is sure that a Main Street gun duel is in the offing when an ex-con comes to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry fears disaster when the sheriff discovers that a farmer's goat has eaten a good-sized meal of dynamite.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney look forward to seeing their high school sweethearts when the Mayberry Class of '45 holds a reunion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee falls for the sales pitch of a fast-talking medicine man and his Indian elixir.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff has his hands full as a clan of mountain musicians descend on Mayberry to meet a bus.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A gentle bubbling stream in the midst of the forest - Bob Ross invites you to share the serenity of Nature's escape with this delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Catch a glimpse of the sun trying to break through shades of soft crimson, shining its golden touch upon the land. Bob Ross creates another black canvas beauty today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Get caught up in the magic as you watch Bob Ross produce a snowy summit and beautiful lake surrounded by shades of greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross delights us with his oval landscape - blue skies, frosty mountain, fresh foothills, and polished lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's such a tranquil day down at the beach! Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely little rowboat that awaits its owner's return.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Truly picture perfect. A bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An abandoned shipping boat hugs a pier in a water scene that Bob Ross completes with some charming old dockside storage sheds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross - follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an innocent creek that slices its way across a landscape of color in a setting that dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificence in sky and sea! Watch the creative brushes of Bob Ross as he paints an ocean view of incredible beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the golden radiance of a setting sun with Bob Ross as night hastens over a softly blended knoll - you'll be home at last, just down trail's end.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross at an old log cabin nestled deep in the powdery woods! An intriguing yet simple painting just beckoning you to paint it yourself.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us home to the farm -- a big red barn and a long rickety wooden fence - capturing our very vivid childhood memories.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
